target: 17. An End Together
What is... this place?
That's... I don't know either.
(Koyuba-san…?)
(No... her Shadow?)
(I hear a voice... but I can't see her...)
(Am I dead, or am I alive... I don't even know that much.)
Ajiro-kun, can you... hear my voice?
I said, hey.
Yeah, I can hear you.
I also... really don't know what this place is.
Maybe... I have a feeling that soon, everything is going to disappear.
(For some reason... I also had that feeling.)
You really did your best, Ajiro-kun.
But no matter how hard you tried, there were just some things that couldn't be helped... things that couldn't come true.
Just like how I gave up.
The keychain... You sent me a message telling me to bring it to the live, right?
This merchandise of the character I liked when I was little... I've been carrying it around with me all this time.
Because it lets me remember those fun times.
(It really seems like she's the one speaking.)
(But... even so, it doesn't mean anything anymore...)
I love you, Ajiro-kun.
Let's meet our end... together.
(What on earth was I... trying to do...)
(At this point, it's already...)
Key TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_ROOTCLEAR_KAO>route: Kaori Koyuba</color>] obtained.
